data.text: Reverse engineer dona.ai styling and recreate it for my portfolio.
Analyzed dona.ai CSS for hex colors, border-radii, spacing, gradients, and font layout. Re-implemented globals.css, Hero, Nav, Projects, Skills, and Contact components to match the clone.

toolCall.result: Extracted CSS tokens and successfully created all portfolio components with the exact styling.

data.text: Created an exact clone of the dona.ai design system using #eeeef5 backgrounds, purple side gradients, pill buttons, and two-tone bold headings in a Next.js web application.
eu acho que vou mudar a identidade visual: https://web.archive.org/web/20000226101337/http://apple.com/ Pensei em fazer algo mais voltado à web antiga, quando as coisas tinham personalidade
Inspected the archived Apple 2000 website. Identified key visual features: pinstripe background, metallic/Aqua tabs, drop shadows, Apple Garamond serif typography, beveled borders, and rigid layout.

tool.name: browser_subagent
tool.description: Inspect the archived Apple website from 2000

toolCall.result: Confirmed visual identity characteristics and successfully drafted the implementation plan.

data.text: Created an implementation plan to overhaul the portfolio to a Skeuomorphic / Aqua / Platinum aesthetic. The user approved the plan.
Execute the retro Apple 2000 redesign and generate walkthrough.

Successfully refactored globals.css, layout.tsx, and all components to the retro Apple 2000 aesthetic. Tailwind was removed to prevent preflight collisions with custom styling. Verified layout and wrote the walkthrough.md artifact summarizing the implementation.

The website now utilizes a fixed 800px width layout with pinstripe backgrounds, Times/Geneva typography, inset/outset beveled borders, metallic tabs, and early OS X Aqua buttons. The final walkthrough was presented to the user.
siga melhor a referência. Quero igual. https://brittanychiang.com/ Use a paleta desse site, mas mantenha o estilo do site antigo da apple.

Extracted the Slate and Teal dark mode palette from brittanychiang.com and successfully integrated it into the retro Apple 2000 layout. Replaced all light hardcoded colors with deep slate and teal accents across all components.

tool.name: browser_subagent
tool.description: Inspect brittanychiang.com to extract exact color palette.

toolCall.result: Extracted colors (Slate 900 background, Slate 200/400 text, Teal 300 accent) and applied them to the CSS and React components successfully.

data.text: Created a unique Dark Mode Skeuomorphic aesthetic. The pinstripe background, metallic tabs, and beveled boxes now use dark Slate navy tones, and the accents/Aqua buttons use vibrant Teal gradients.
